title: Crucible Shop
description: Adds one or more shops to the Crucible system. Players can spend an actor's real currency on real inventory items, staged into a cart and only applied when they confirm. GMs invite players to shop via a chat button, and can define any number of shops - the built-in default draws from the system's Equipment compendium tree (the same one used during Hero character creation), while custom shops are stocked by hand-picking items.
